fields.name: VERSION_ID
fields.description: VERSION_ID[7:0]: version of the embedded IP.

fields.name: CONT
fields.description: CONT: regular sequence runs continuously when ADC mode is enabled: 0: enable the single conversion: when the sequence is over, the conversion stops 1: enable the continuous conversion: when the sequence is over, the sequence starts again until the software sets the CTRL.STOP_OP_MODE bit.

fields.name: SEQUENCE
fields.description: SEQUENCE: enable the sequence mode (active by default): 0: sequence mode is disabled, only SEQ0 is selected 1: sequence mode is enabled, conversions from SEQ0 to SEQx with x=SEQ_LEN Note: clearing this bit is equivalent to SEQUENCE=1 and SEQ_LEN=0000. Ideally, this bit can be kept high as redundant with keeping high and setting SEQ_LEN=0000.

fields.name: SEQ_LEN
fields.description: SEQ_LEN[3:0]: number of conversions in a regular sequence: 0000: 1 conversion, starting from SEQ0 0001: 2 conversions, starting from SEQ0 ... 1111: 16 conversions, starting from SEQ0.

fields.name: SMPS_SYNCHRO_ENA
fields.description: SMPS_SYNCHRO_ENA: synchronize the ADC start conversion with a pulse generated by the SMPS: 0: SMPS synchronization is disabled for all ADC clock frequencies 1: SMPS synchronization is enabled (only when ADC clock is 8 MHz or 16 MHz) Note: SMPS_SYNCHRO_ENA must be 0 when the ADC analog clock is 32 MHz or when PWRC_CR5.NOSMPS = 1.

fields.name: OP_MODE
fields.description: ADC mode selection (= data path selection).

fields.name: SAMPLE_RATE_LSB
fields.description: SAMPLE_RATE_LSB: Sample Rate LSB This field is an extension of SAMPLE_RATE definition in bits 12,11 of CONF register. It impacts the conversion rate of ADC (F_ADC). See SAMPLE_RATE bits for the full description. When this field is set to a value different than 0, SMPS synchronization is not feasible. This value is hidden to the user.

fields.name: SAMPLE_RATE
fields.description: SAMPLE_RATE[1:0]: conversion rate of ADC (F_ADC): F_ADC = F_ADC_CLK/(16 + 16*SAMPLE_RATE_MSB + 4*SAMPLE_RATE + SAMPLE_RATE_LSB),where F_ADC_CLK is the analog ADC clock frequency. By default F_ADC_CLK is 16MHz frequency.

fields.name: DMA_DS_ENA
fields.description: DMA_DS_EN: enable the DMA mode for the Down Sampler data path: 0: DMA mode is disabled 1: DMA mode is enabled.

fields.name: DMA_DF_ENA
fields.description: enable DMA mode for Decimation Filter data path.

fields.name: OVR_DS_CFG
fields.description: OVR_DS_CFG: Down Sampler overrun configuration: 0: the previous data is kept, the new one is lost 1: the previous data is lost, the new one is kept.

fields.name: OVR_DF_CFG
fields.description: decimation overrun configuration.

fields.name: BIT_INVERT_SN
fields.description: BIT_INVERT_SN: invert bit to bit the ADC data output (1's complement) when a single negative input is connected to the ADC: 0: no inversion (default) 1: enable the inversion.

fields.name: BIT_INVERT_DIFF
fields.description: BIT_INVERT_DIFF: invert bit to bit the ADC data output (1's complement) when a differential input is connected to the ADC: 0: no inversion (default) 1: enable the inversion.

fields.name: ADC_CONT_1V2
fields.description: ADC_CONT_1V2: select the input sampling method: 0: sampling only at conversion start (default) 1: sampling starts at the end of conversion.

fields.name: VBIAS_PRECH_FORCE
fields.description: possibility to keep the VBIAS_PRECH enabled to deactivate the filter.

fields.name: SAMPLE_RATE_MSB
fields.description: SAMPLE_RATE_MSB: Sample Rate MSB This field is an extension of SAMPLE_RATE definition in bits 12,11 of CONF register. It impacts the conversion rate of ADC (F_ADC). See SAMPLE_RATE bits for the full description.

fields.name: ADC_ON_OFF
fields.description: ADC_ON_OFF: 0: power off the ADC 1: power on the ADC.

fields.name: START_CONV
fields.description: START_CONV (1): generate a start pulse to initiate an ADC conversion: 0: no effect 1: start the ADC conversion Note: this bit is set by software and cleared by hardware.

fields.name: START_CON
fields.description: generate a start pulse to initiate an ADC conversion.

fields.name: STOP_OP_MODE
fields.description: STOP_OP_MODE (1): stop the on-going OP_MODE (ADC mode, Analog audio mode, Full mode): 0: no effect 1: stop on-going ADC mode Note: this bit is set by software and cleared by hardware. When setting the STOP_MODE_OP, the user has to wait around 10 us before to start a new ADC conversion by setting the START_CONV bit.

fields.name: STOP_OP_MOD
fields.description: stop the on-going OP_MODE (ADC mode, Analog audio mode, Full.

fields.name: DIG_AUD_MODE
fields.description: enable the digital audio mode (the data path uses. the decimation filter).

fields.name: TEST_MODE
fields.description: TEST_MODE: select the functional or the test mode of the ADC: 0: functional mode (one of the four main functional modes is used) 1: test mode (for debug, test, calibration).

fields.name: ADC_LDO_ENA
fields.description: ADC_LDO_ENA: enable the LDO associated to the ADC block: 0: disable the ADC LDO 1: enable the ADC LDO.

fields.name: OCM_SRC
fields.description: select the occasional conversion source.

fields.name: OCM_ENA
fields.description: start occasional conversion in analog audio and full. modes.

fields.name: PGA_GAIN
fields.description: from 6 to 30 dB.

fields.name: PGA_BIAS
fields.description: set the microphone bias voltage.

fields.name: SE_VIN_0
fields.description: SE_VIN_0[1:0]: input voltage for VINM[0] / VINP[0]-VINM[0] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_1
fields.description: SE_VIN_1[1:0]: input voltage for VINM[1] / VINP[1]-VINM[1] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_2
fields.description: SE_VIN_2[1:0]: input voltage for VINM[2] / VINP[2]-VINM[2] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_3
fields.description: SE_VIN_3[1:0]: input voltage for VINM[3] / VINP[3]-VINM[3] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_4
fields.description: SE_VIN_4[1:0]: input voltage for VINP[0] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_5
fields.description: SE_VIN_5[1:0]: input voltage for VINP[1] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_6
fields.description: SE_VIN_6[1:0]: input voltage for VINP[2] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: SE_VIN_7
fields.description: SE_VIN_7[1:0]: input voltage for VINP[3] 00: Vinput = 1.2V 01: reserved (not used for this cut) 10: Vinput = 2.4V 11: Vinput = 3.6V.

fields.name: DF_CIC_DHF
fields.description: CIC filter decimator half factor.

fields.name: DF_ITP1P2
fields.description: 1.2 fractional interpolator enable.

fields.name: DF_I_U2S
fields.description: select signed/unsigned format for input.

fields.name: DF_O_S2U
fields.description: select signed/unsigned format for data output.

fields.name: PDM_RATE
fields.description: select the PDM clock rate.

fields.name: DF_MICROL_RN
fields.description: left/right channel selection on digital microphone.

fields.name: DF_HPF_EN
fields.description: high pass filter enable.

fields.name: DF_HALF_D_EN
fields.description: half dynamic enable.

fields.name: DS_RATIO
fields.description: DS_RATIO[2:0]: program the Down Sampler ratio (N factor) 000: ratio = 1, no down sampling (default) 001: ratio = 2 010: ratio = 4 011: ratio = 8 100: ratio = 16 101: ratio = 32 110: ratio = 64 111: ratio = 128.

fields.name: DS_WIDTH
fields.description: DS_WIDTH[2:0]: program the Down Sampler width of data output (DSDTATA) 000: DS_DATA output on 12-bit (default) 001: DS_DATA output on 13-bit 010: DS_DATA output on 14-bit 011: DS_DATA output on 15-bit 100: DS_DATA output on 16-bit 1xx: reserved.

fields.name: SEQ0
fields.description: SEQ0[3:0]: channel number code for first conversion of the sequence 0000: VINM[0] to ADC single negative input 0001: VINM[1] to ADC single negative input 0010: VINM[2] to ADC single negative input 0011: VINM[3] to ADC single negative input 0100: VINP[0] to ADC single positive input 0101: VINP[1] to ADC single positive input 0110: VINP[2] to ADC single positive input 0111: VINP[3] to ADC single positive input 1000: VINP[0]-VINM[0] to ADC differential input 1001: VINP[1]-VINM[1] to ADC differential input 1010: VINP[2]-VINM[2] to ADC differential input 1011: VINP[3]-VINM[3] to ADC differential input 1100: VBAT - Battery level detector 1101: Temperature sensor 111x: reserved.

fields.name: SEQ1
fields.description: SEQ1[3:0]: channel number code for second conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ2
fields.description: SEQ2[3:0]: channel number code for 3rd conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ3
fields.description: SEQ3[3:0]: channel number code for 4th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ4
fields.description: SEQ4[3:0]: channel number code for 5th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ5
fields.description: SEQ5[3:0]: channel number code for 6th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ6
fields.description: SEQ6[3:0]: channel number code for 7th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ7
fields.description: SEQ7[3:0]: channel number code for 8th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ8
fields.description: SEQ8[3:0]: channel number code for 9th conversion of the sequence 0000: VINM[0] to ADC single negative input 0001: VINM[1] to ADC single negative input 0010: VINM[2] to ADC single negative input 0011: VINM[3] to ADC single negative input 0100: VINP[0] to ADC single positive input 0101: VINP[1] to ADC single positive input 0110: VINP[2] to ADC single positive input 0111: VINP[3] to ADC single positive input 1000: VINP[0]-VINM[0] to ADC differential input 1001: VINP[1]-VINM[1] to ADC differential input 1010: VINP[2]-VINM[2] to ADC differential input 1011: VINP[3]-VINM[3] to ADC differential input 1100: VBAT - Battery level detector 1101: Temperature sensor 111x: reserved.

fields.name: SEQ9
fields.description: SEQ9[3:0]: channel number code for 10th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ10
fields.description: SEQ10[3:0]: channel number code for 11th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ11
fields.description: SEQ11[3:0]: channel number code for 12th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ12
fields.description: SEQ12[3:0]: channel number code for 13th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ13
fields.description: SEQ13[3:0]: channel number code for 14th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ14
fields.description: SEQ14[3:0]: channel number code for 15th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: SEQ15
fields.description: SEQ15[3:0]: channel number code for 16th conversion of the sequence. See SEQ0 for code detail.

fields.name: GAIN1
fields.description: GAIN1[11:0]: first calibration point: gain AUXADC_GAIN_1V2[11:0].

fields.name: OFFSET1
fields.description: OFFSET1[7:0]: first calibration point: offset compensation[7:0] with sign.

fields.name: GAIN2
fields.description: GAIN2[11:0]: second calibration point: gain AUXADC_GAIN_1V2[11:0].

fields.name: OFFSET2
fields.description: OFFSET2[7:0]: second calibration point: offset compensation[7:0] with sign.

fields.name: GAIN3
fields.description: GAIN3[11:0]: third calibration point: gain AUXADC_GAIN_1V2[11:0].

fields.name: OFFSET3
fields.description: OFFSET3[7:0]: third calibration point: offset compensation[7:0] with sign.

fields.name: GAIN4
fields.description: GAIN4[11:0]: fourth calibration point: gain AUXADC_GAIN_1V2[11:0].

fields.name: OFFSET4
fields.description: OFFSET4[7:0]: fourth calibration point: offset compensation[7:0] with sign.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN0
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN0[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC single negative mode with Vinput range = 1.2V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET0
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC single negative mode with Vinput range = 1.2V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN1
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN1[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC single positive mode with Vinput range = 1.2V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET1
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC single positive mode with Vinput range = 1.2V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN2
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN2[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC differential mode with Vinput range = 1.2V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET2
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC differential mode with Vinput range = 1.2V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN3
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN3[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC single negative mode with Vinput range = 2.4V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET3
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC single negative mode with Vinput range = 2.4V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN4
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN4[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC single positive mode with Vinput range = 2.4V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET4
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC single positive mode with Vinput range = 2.4V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN5
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN5[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC differential mode with Vinput range = 2.4V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET5
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC differential mode with Vinput range = 2.4V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN6
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN6[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC single negative mode with Vinput range = 3.6V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET6
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC single negative mode with Vinput range = 3.6V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN7
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN7[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC single positive mode with Vinput range = 3.6V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET7
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC single positive mode with Vinput range = 3.6V.

fields.name: OFFSET_GAIN8
fields.description: OFFSET_GAIN8[1:0]: gain / offset used in ADC differential mode with Vinput range = 3.6V: 00: OFFSET1 and GAIN1 from COMP_1 01: OFFSET2 and GAIN2 from COMP_2 10: OFFSET3 and GAIN3 from COMP_3 11: OFFSET4 and GAIN4 from COMP_4.

fields.name: GAIN_OFFSET8
fields.description: gain / offset used in ADC differential mode with Vinput range = 3.6V.

fields.name: WD_LT
fields.description: WD_LT[11:0]: analog watchdog low level threshold.

fields.name: WD_HT
fields.description: WD_HT[11:0]: analog watchdog high level threshold.

fields.name: AWD_CHX
fields.description: AWD_CHX[15:0]: analog watchdog channel selection to define which input channel(s) need to be guarded by the watchdog. Bit0: VINM[0] to ADC negative input Bit1: VINM[1] to ADC negative input Bit2: VINM[2] to ADC negative input Bit3: VINM[3] to ADC negative input Bit4: Not used Bit5: VBAT to ADC negative input Bit6: GND to ADC negative input Bit7: VDDA to ADC negative input Bit8: VINP[0] to ADC positive input Bit9: VINP[1] to ADC positive input Bit10: VINP[2] to ADC positive input Bit11: VINP[3] to ADC positive input Bit12: Not used Bit13: TEMP to ADC positive input Bit14: GND to ADC positive input Bit15: VDDA to ADC positive input.

fields.name: DS_DATA
fields.description: DS_DATA[15:0]: contain the converted data at the output of the Down Sampler.

fields.name: DF_DATA
fields.description: contain the converted data at the output of the. decimation filter.

fields.name: EOC_IRQ
fields.description: EOC_IRQ (Used in test mode only): set when the ADC conversion is completed. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: ADC conversion is not completed 1: ADC conversion is completed Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: EODS_IRQ
fields.description: EODS_IRQ: set when the Down Sampler conversion is completed. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: Down Sampler conversion is not completed 1: Down Sampler conversion is completed Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: EODF_IRQ
fields.description: set when the decimation filter conversion is completed.

fields.name: EOS_IRQ
fields.description: EOS_IRQ: set when a sequence of conversion is completed. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: sequence of conversion is not completed 1: sequence of conversion is completed Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: AWD_IRQ
fields.description: AWD_IRQ: set when an analog watchdog event occurs. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: no analog watchdog event occurred 1: analog watchdog event has occurred Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: OVR_DS_IRQ
fields.description: OVR_DS_IRQ: set to indicate a Down Sampler overrun (at least one data is lost) When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: no overrun occurred 1: overrun occurred Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: OVR_DF_IRQ
fields.description: set to indicate a decimation filter overrun (a data is lost).

fields.name: DF_OVRFL_IRQ
fields.description: set to indicate the decimation filter is saturated.

fields.name: EOC_IRQ
fields.description: EOC_IRQ (Used in test mode only): set when the ADC conversion is completed. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: ADC conversion is not completed 1: ADC conversion is completed Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: EOC_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: (Used in test mode only): End of ADC conversion interrupt enable.

fields.name: EODS_IRQ
fields.description: EODS_IRQ: set when the Down Sampler conversion is completed. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: Down Sampler conversion is not completed 1: Down Sampler conversion is completed Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: EODS_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: End of conversion interrupt enable for the Down Sampler output.

fields.name: EODF_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: End of conversion interrupt enable for the decimation filter output.

fields.name: EOS_IRQ
fields.description: EOS_IRQ: set when a sequence of conversion is completed. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: sequence of conversion is not completed 1: sequence of conversion is completed Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: EOS_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: End of regular sequence interrupt enable.

fields.name: AWD_IRQ
fields.description: AWD_IRQ: set when an analog watchdog event occurs. When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: no analog watchdog event occurred 1: analog watchdog event has occurred Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: AWD_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: analog watchdog interrupt enable.

fields.name: OVR_DS_IRQ
fields.description: OVR_DS_IRQ: set to indicate a Down Sampler overrun (at least one data is lost) When read, provide the status of the interrupt: 0: no overrun occurred 1: overrun occurred Writing this bit clears the status of the interrupt: 0: no effect 1: clear the interrupt.

fields.name: OVR_DS_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: Down Sampler overrun interrupt enable.

fields.name: OVR_DF_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: decimation filter overrun interrupt enable.

fields.name: DF_OVRFL_IRQ_ENA
fields.description: decimation filter saturation interrupt enable.

registers.name: TIMER_CONF
registers.description: Time to add after an LDO Enable or ADC Enable to let the HW to be stable before using it.
registers.fieldset_description: Time to add after an LDO Enable or ADC Enable to let the HW to be stable before using it.

fields.name: ADC_LDO_DELAY
fields.description: define the duration of a waiting time to be inserted between the ADC_LDO enable and the ADC ON to let time to the LDO to stabilize before starting a conversion.

fields.name: VBIAS_PRECH_DELAY
fields.description: define the duration of a waiting time starting at rising edge of PGA_EN signal and corresponding to the VBIAS precharge duration.

fields.name: PRECH_DELAY_SEL
fields.description: Select the time step PD_STEP for the VBIAS_PRECH_DELAY timer.
